name: MDS_fairagro
displayName: MDS_fairagro

name: name
displayName: description

name: MDS_fairagro.identifier
displayName: Primary identifier of the dataset within the FAIRagro Search Hub

name: MDS_fairagro.citation
displayName: A set of generic metadata for datasets

name: MDS_fairagro.citation.title
displayName: The main title of the Dataset

name: MDS_fairagro.citation.alternativeTitle
displayName: Either 1) a title commonly used to refer to the Dataset or 2) an abbreviation of the main title

name: MDS_fairagro.citation.author
displayName: The entity, e.g. a person or organization, that created the Dataset

name: MDS_fairagro.citation.author.authorName
displayName: 'The name of the author, such as the person''s name or the name of an organization'

name: MDS_fairagro.citation.author.authorAffiliation
displayName: 'The name of the entity affiliated with the author, e.g. an organization''s name'

name: MDS_fairagro.citation.author.authorIdentifier
displayName: Uniquely identifies the author when paired with an identifier type

name: MDS_fairagro.citation.author.authorIdentifierScheme
displayName: The type of identifier that uniquely identifies the author (e.g. ORCID, ISNI)

name: MDS_fairagro.citation.contributor
displayName: The entity, such as a person or organization, responsible for collecting, managing, or otherwise contributing to the development of the Dataset

name: MDS_fairagro.citation.contributor.contributorName
displayName: 'The name of the contributor, e.g. the person''s name or the name of an organization'

name: MDS_fairagro.citation.contributor.contributorType
displayName: Indicates the type of contribution made to the dataset

name: MDS_fairagro.citation.datasetContact
displayName: The entity, e.g. a person or organization, that users of the Dataset can contact with questions

name: MDS_fairagro.citation.datasetContact.datasetContactName
displayName: 'The name of the point of contact, e.g. the person''s name or the name of an organization'

name: MDS_fairagro.citation.datasetContact.datasetContactAffiliation
displayName: 'The name of the entity affiliated with the point of contact, e.g. an organization''s name'

name: MDS_fairagro.citation.datasetContact.datasetContactEmail
displayName: 'The point of contact''s email address'

name: MDS_fairagro.citation.dsDescription
displayName: A summary describing the purpose, nature, and scope of the Dataset

name: MDS_fairagro.citation.dsDescription.dsDescriptionValue
displayName: A summary describing the purpose, nature, and scope of the Dataset

name: MDS_fairagro.citation.subject
displayName: The area of study relevant to the Dataset

name: MDS_fairagro.citation.keyword
displayName: A key term that describes an important aspect of the Dataset and information about any controlled vocabulary used

name: MDS_fairagro.citation.keyword.keywordValue
displayName: A key term that describes important aspects of the Dataset

name: MDS_fairagro.citation.keyword.keywordTermURI
displayName: A URI that points to the web presence of the Keyword Term

name: MDS_fairagro.citation.keyword.keywordVocabulary
displayName: The controlled vocabulary used for the keyword term (e.g. LCSH, MeSH)

name: MDS_fairagro.citation.keyword.keywordVocabularyURI
displayName: 'The URL where one can access information about the term''s controlled vocabulary'

name: MDS_fairagro.citation.language
displayName: 'A language that the Dataset''s files are written in'

name: MDS_fairagro.citation.productionDate
displayName: The date when the data were produced (not distributed, published, or archived)

name: MDS_fairagro.citation.distributionDate
displayName: The date when the Dataset was made available for distribution/presentation

name: MDS_fairagro.citation.publication
displayName: The article or report that uses the data in the Dataset. The full list of related publications will be displayed on the metadata tab

name: MDS_fairagro.citation.publication.publicationCitation
displayName: The full bibliographic citation for the related publication

name: MDS_fairagro.citation.publication.publicationIDType
displayName: The type of identifier that uniquely identifies a related publication

name: MDS_fairagro.citation.publication.publicationIDNumber
displayName: The identifier for a related publication

name: MDS_fairagro.citation.publication.publicationURL
displayName: The URL form of the identifier entered in the Identifier field, e.g. the DOI URL if a DOI was entered in the Identifier field. Used to display what was entered in the ID Type and ID Number fields as a link. If what was entered in the Identifier field has no URL form, the URL of the publication webpage is used, e.g. a journal article

name: MDS_fairagro.citation.relatedDatasets
displayName: 'Information, such as a persistent ID or citation, about a related dataset, such as previous research on the Dataset''s subject'

name: MDS_fairagro.citation.timePeriodCovered
displayName: The time period that the data refer to. Also known as span. This is the time period covered by the data, not the dates of coding, collecting data, or making documents machine-readable

name: MDS_fairagro.citation.timePeriodCovered.timePeriodCoveredStart
displayName: The start date of the time period that the data refer to

name: MDS_fairagro.citation.timePeriodCovered.timePeriodCoveredEnd
displayName: The end date of the time period that the data refer to

name: MDS_fairagro.generalExtended
displayName: A set of generic metadata for datasets

name: MDS_fairagro.generalExtended.identifier
displayName: 'Unique identifier for the Dataset (e.g. producer''s or another repository''s identifier)'

name: MDS_fairagro.generalExtended.identifier.identifierValue
displayName: Another identifier uniquely identifies the Dataset

name: MDS_fairagro.generalExtended.identifier.identifierAgency
displayName: The name of the agency that generated the other identifier

name: MDS_fairagro.generalExtended.identifier.identifierURI
displayName: A resolvable link corresponding to the identifier

name: MDS_fairagro.generalExtended.resourceType
displayName: The nature or genre of the resource.

name: MDS_fairagro.generalExtended.accessRights
displayName: Information about who access the resource or an indication of its security status.

name: MDS_fairagro.generalExtended.isAccessibleForFree
displayName: A flag to signal that the item, event, or place is accessible for free.

name: MDS_fairagro.generalExtended.yieldMeasurementMethod
displayName: Information on how the yield measurement of the dataset was generated.

name: MDS_fairagro.generalExtended.dataSource
displayName: Experiment type or data source from which the dataset was generated.

name: MDS_fairagro.generalExtended.sourceRDI
displayName: The original Research Data Infrastructure that the dataset was published by.

name: MDS_fairagro.generalExtended.sourceRDI.sourceRDIName
displayName: The name of the original Research Data Infrastructure that the dataset was published by.

name: MDS_fairagro.generalExtended.sourceRDI.sourceRDIURI
displayName: The landing page of the original Research Data Infrastructure that the dataset was published by.

name: MDS_fairagro.generalExtended.sourceRDI.sourceRDIID
displayName: A persistent identifier of the Research Data Infrastructure

name: MDS_fairagro.generalExtended.sourceRDI.sourceRDIID.sourceRDIIDvalue
displayName: The value of a Research Data Infrastructure identifier

name: MDS_fairagro.generalExtended.sourceRDI.sourceRDIID.sourceRDIIDscheme
displayName: The scheme of a Research Data Infrastructure identifier

name: MDS_fairagro.generalExtended.sourceDatasetURI
displayName: A link to the original landing page of the dataset.

name: MDS_fairagro.generalExtended.license
displayName: The terms under which this dataset has been published.

name: MDS_fairagro.generalExtended.format
displayName: The file format(s) of the dataset.

name: MDS_fairagro.generalExtended.dateModified
displayName: 'The date on which the Dataset was most recently modified or when the item''s entry was modified.'

name: MDS_fairagro.generalExtended.spatialResolution
displayName: Minimum spatial separation resolvable in a dataset, measured in meters.

name: MDS_fairagro.generalExtended.versionNumber
displayName: The version number of the dataset.

name: MDS_fairagro.generalExtended.variableMeasured
displayName: Variables measured in a dataset

name: MDS_fairagro.generalExtended.variableMeasured.variableMeasuredName
displayName: The name of a variable measured in the dataset.

name: MDS_fairagro.generalExtended.variableMeasured.variableMeasuredAbbreviation
displayName: Abbreviation or short name of a variable measured in the dataset.

name: MDS_fairagro.generalExtended.variableMeasured.variableMeasuredDescription
displayName: The description of a variable measured in the dataset.

name: MDS_fairagro.generalExtended.variableMeasured.variableMeasuredURI
displayName: Reference to a resource (e.g. a terminology concept) representing a variable measured in the dataset.

name: MDS_fairagro.generalExtended.variableMeasured.variableMeasuredValue
displayName: The value of a variable measured in the dataset.

name: MDS_fairagro.generalExtended.variableMeasured.variableMeasuredValueURI
displayName: Reference to a resource (e.g. a terminology concept) representing a value of a variable measured in the dataset.

name: MDS_fairagro.generalExtended.variableMeasured.variableMeasuredUnit
displayName: The unit of a variable measured in the dataset.

name: MDS_fairagro.generalExtended.variableMeasured.variableMeasuredUnitURI
displayName: Reference to a resource (e.g. a terminology concept) representing a unit of a variable measured in the dataset.

name: MDS_fairagro.generalExtended.variableMeasured.variableMeasuredMeasurementTechnique
displayName: The technique used to measure a variable measured in the dataset.

name: MDS_fairagro.geographic
displayName: A set of geographic metadata

name: MDS_fairagro.geographic.geographicCoverage
displayName: Information on the geographic coverage of the data. Includes the total geographic scope of the data.

name: MDS_fairagro.geographic.geographicCoverage.city
displayName: The name of the city that the Dataset is about. Use GeoNames for correct spelling and avoid abbreviations.

name: MDS_fairagro.geographic.geographicCoverage.country
displayName: The country or nation that the Dataset is about.

name: MDS_fairagro.geographic.geographicCoverage.state
displayName: The state or province that the Dataset is about. Use GeoNames for correct spelling and avoid abbreviations.

name: MDS_fairagro.geographic.geographicBoundingBox
displayName: 'The fundamental geometric description for any Dataset that models geography is the geographic bounding box. It describes the minimum box, defined by west and east longitudes and north and south latitudes, which includes the largest geographic extent of the  Dataset''s geographic coverage. This element is used in the first pass of a coordinate-based search. Inclusion of this element in the codebook is recommended, but is required if the bound polygon box is included.'

name: MDS_fairagro.geographic.geographicBoundingBox.westLongitude
displayName: Westernmost coordinate delimiting the geographic extent of the Dataset. A valid range of values,  expressed in decimal degrees, is -180.0 <= West  Bounding Longitude Value <= 180.0.

name: MDS_fairagro.geographic.geographicBoundingBox.eastLongitude
displayName: Easternmost coordinate delimiting the geographic extent of the Dataset. A valid range of values,  expressed in decimal degrees, is -180.0 <= East Bounding Longitude Value <= 180.0.

name: MDS_fairagro.geographic.geographicBoundingBox.northLatitude
displayName: Northernmost coordinate delimiting the geographic extent of the Dataset. A valid range of values,  expressed in decimal degrees, is -90.0 <= North Bounding Latitude Value <= 90.0.

name: MDS_fairagro.geographic.geographicBoundingBox.southLatitude
displayName: Southernmost coordinate delimiting the geographic extent of the Dataset. A valid range of values,  expressed in decimal degrees, is -90.0 <= South Bounding Latitude Value <= 90.0.

name: MDS_fairagro.crop
displayName: A set of metadata describing crops.

name: MDS_fairagro.crop.crop
displayName: A crop entity represents a sample of a speficic plant or group of plants, sharing the same taxonomic species, that are described in a dataset.

name: MDS_fairagro.crop.crop.cropSpecies
displayName: Taxonomic crop species that is part of the dataset.

name: MDS_fairagro.crop.crop.cropSpeciesURI
displayName: Reference to a resource (e.g. a terminology concept) representing a crop species that is part of the dataset.

name: MDS_fairagro.crop.crop.cropVariety
displayName: A plant variety that is part of the dataset and that is a member of a defined group of plants, selected from within a species, with a common set of characteristics.

name: MDS_fairagro.crop.crop.cropVarietyURI
displayName: Reference to a resource (e.g. a terminology concept) representing a crop variety that is part of the dataset.

name: MDS_fairagro.crop.crop.cropSowingDate
displayName: Date of sowing when the described crop was planted.

name: MDS_fairagro.crop.crop.cropHarvestingDate
displayName: Date when the described crop was harvested.

name: MDS_fairagro.crop.crop.cropPestName
displayName: Name of a pest (e.g. insects, fungi, microorganisms) that has affected a crop.

name: MDS_fairagro.crop.crop.cropPestURI
displayName: Reference to a resource (e.g. a terminology concept) representing a pest that is part of the dataset.

name: MDS_fairagro.soil
displayName: A set of metadata describing soils.

name: MDS_fairagro.soil.soil
displayName: A soil entity represents a speficic soil sample, that is described in a dataset, representative for a bigger unit of land.

name: MDS_fairagro.soil.soil.soilTexture
displayName: Indication of relative contents of particles in the soil described in the dataset.

name: MDS_fairagro.soil.soil.soilTextureURI
displayName: Reference to a resource (e.g. a terminology concept) representing a soil texture that is part of the dataset.

name: MDS_fairagro.soil.soil.soilReferenceGroup
displayName: Reference Soil Groups are distinguished by the presence (or absence) of specific diagnostic horizons, properties and/or materials.

name: MDS_fairagro.soil.soil.soilReferenceGroupURI
displayName: Reference to a resource (e.g. a terminology concept) representing a soil reference group that is part of the dataset.

name: MDS_fairagro.soil.soil.soilPH
displayName: Hydrogen ion concentration in the soil.

name: MDS_fairagro.soil.soil.soilBulkDensity
displayName: The mass of material particles divided by the bulk volume in g/cm³.

name: MDS_fairagro.soil.soil.soilDepth
displayName: The depth at which a sample of soil is collected during a soil sampling process in centimeters.

name: MDS_fairagro.soil.soil.soilDepth.soilTopDepth
displayName: The top depth at which a sample of soil is collected during a soil sampling process.

name: MDS_fairagro.soil.soil.soilDepth.soilBottomDepth
displayName: The bottom depth at which a sample of soil is collected during a soil sampling process.

name: MDS_fairagro.soil.soil.soilAvailableWaterContent
displayName: Quantity of water present in the soil and usable by plants, classically defined as the difference between moisture at field capacity and moisture at wilting point in m³/m³.

name: MDS_fairagro.soil.soil.soilOrganicCarbon
displayName: Percentual share of solid carbon in the soil.

name: MDS_fairagro.soil.soil.soilTotalCarbon
displayName: Percentual total amount of carbon in the soil.

name: MDS_fairagro.soil.soil.soilTotalNitrogen
displayName: Percentual total amount of nitrogen in the soil.

name: MDS_fairagro.plot
displayName: A set of metadata describing plots.

name: MDS_fairagro.plot.plot
displayName: A plot of land is an area of land with a particular ownership, land use, or other characteristic. A plot is frequently used as the basis for a cadastre or land registration system.

name: MDS_fairagro.plot.plot.plotLocation
displayName: The geolocation of the plot.

name: MDS_fairagro.plot.plot.plotLocation.plotLocationDescription
displayName: 'A description of the plot''s location'

name: MDS_fairagro.plot.plot.plotLocation.plotLocationBoundingBox.plotLocationWestLongitude
displayName: Westernmost coordinate delimiting the geographic extent of the plot. A valid range of values,  expressed in decimal degrees, is -180.0 <= West  Bounding Longitude Value <= 180.0.

name: MDS_fairagro.plot.plot.plotLocation.plotLocationBoundingBox.plotLocationEastLongitude
displayName: Easternmost coordinate delimiting the geographic extent of the plot. A valid range of values,  expressed in decimal degrees, is -180.0 <= East Bounding Longitude Value <= 180.0.

name: MDS_fairagro.plot.plot.plotLocation.plotLocationBoundingBox.plotLocationNorthLatitude
displayName: Northernmost coordinate delimiting the geographic extent of the plot. A valid range of values,  expressed in decimal degrees, is -90.0 <= North Bounding Latitude Value <= 90.0.

name: MDS_fairagro.plot.plot.plotLocation.plotLocationBoundingBox.plotLocationSouthLatitude
displayName: Southernmost coordinate delimiting the geographic extent of the plot. A valid range of values,  expressed in decimal degrees, is -90.0 <= South Bounding Latitude Value <= 90.0.

name: MDS_fairagro.plot.plot.plotCropYield
displayName: The amount of plant crop (such as cereal, grain or legume) harvested per unit area for a given time in dt/ha.

name: MDS_fairagro.plot.plot.plotElevation
displayName: Altitude, like elevation, is the distance above sea level in meters.

name: MDS_fairagro.plot.plot.plotSize
displayName: The size of a specific plot measured in m².

name: MDS_fairagro.plot.plot.plotSpatialReferenceSystem
displayName: The spatial reference system (SRS) or coordinate reference system (CRS) used to express the geographic information of a plot.

name: MDS_fairagro.sensor
displayName: A set of metadata describing sensors.

name: MDS_fairagro.sensor.sensor
displayName: A sensor entity represents a specific sensor, that is described in a dataset, or was used to create measurements in it.

name: MDS_fairagro.sensor.sensor.sensorIsHostedBy
displayName: Relation between a sensor and the platform that it is mounted on or hosted by.

name: MDS_fairagro.sensor.sensor.sensorIsHostedBy.sensorPlatformType
displayName: The specific type of a platform a sensor is hosted by.

name: MDS_fairagro.sensor.sensor.sensorIsHostedBy.sensorPlatformTypeURI
displayName: Reference to a resource (e.g. a terminology concept) representing a platform type that is part of the dataset.

name: MDS_fairagro.sensor.sensor.sensorIsHostedBy.sensorPlatformModelName
displayName: Name of a specific platform model.

name: MDS_fairagro.sensor.sensor.sensorIsHostedBy.sensorPlatformManufacturerName
displayName: Name of the manufacturer of a specific platform.

name: MDS_fairagro.sensor.sensor.sensorActivityType
displayName: Describes if the sensor is an active or a passive sensor.

name: MDS_fairagro.sensor.sensor.sensorSensorType
displayName: Describes what type of information the sensor measures.

name: MDS_fairagro.sensor.sensor.sensorBandCategory
displayName: Describes if a sensor uses single, multi or hyper spectral bands.

name: MDS_fairagro.sensor.sensor.sensorSpectralBand
displayName: Describes a specific spectral band(s) of a sensor.

name: MDS_fairagro.agriculturalProcess
displayName: A set of metadata describing planned processes which occur in an agricultural field.

name: MDS_fairagro.agriculturalProcess.agriculturalProcess
displayName: An agricultural process entity represents a specific agricultural process, that is described in a dataset.

name: MDS_fairagro.agriculturalProcess.agriculturalProcess.agriculturalProcessName
displayName: The name of a planned process which occurs in an agricultural field.

name: MDS_fairagro.chemicalSubstance
displayName: A set of metadata describing chemical substances such as fertilizers and pesticides.

name: MDS_fairagro.chemicalSubstance.chemicalSubstance
displayName: A specific chemical substance described in the dataset.

name: MDS_fairagro.chemicalSubstance.chemicalSubstance.chemicalSubstanceName
displayName: The name of a chemical substance.

name: MDS_fairagro.chemicalSubstance.chemicalSubstance.chemicalSubstanceApprovalNumber
displayName: The approval number if a chemical substance registered by an approval agency.

name: DatasetField
displayName: identifier
